headline: GE Vernova Robotech Deal Puts Automation And Valuation In Fresh Focus
summary: GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) has entered a definitive agreement to acquire Robotech Automation. The deal is aimed at strengthening robotics and automation across GE Vernova's manufacturing and grid solutions operations. Robotech Automation is already working with GE Vernova on key supply chain projects. GE Vernova, trading at $968.32, has had a mixed recent share price path, with the stock down 6.8% over the past week and down 8.9% over the past month, while still up 42.5% year to date and 105.2%...
